requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — SCDF ESS Technical Requirements as Mandatory Project Gate
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——SCDF ESS技术要求作为强制项目门槛
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——SCDF ESS技術要求作為強制項目門檻

summary.en: The Singapore Civil Defence Force (SCDF), under the Fire Safety Act (Cap. 109A), is the authority having jurisdiction for fire safety in Singapore. SCDF has published specific Technical Requirements for Energy Storage Systems (ESS), which constitute a mandatory approval gate for all BESS installations above the prescribed threshold capacity — whether in residential, commercial, industrial, or utility settings. SCDF ESS Technical Requirements cover system-level fire-safety design, siting, separation distances, thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, fire suppression, gas detection and ventilation, emergency shutdown, and documentation submission for SCDF approval. These requirements are Singapore-specific and are a distinct, non-waivable project gate that must be cleared before installation and commissioning. SCDF approval is separate from EMA grid-connection approval — both must be obtained. SCDF-approved fire-safety inspectors and qualified persons (QPs) registered with SCDF must be engaged for design submission and approval. Singapore is a leading urban-BESS market, with Jurong Island ESS and other commercial and industrial projects setting practical precedents for SCDF compliance expectations.
summary.zh: 新加坡民防部队（SCDF）依据《消防安全法》（第109A章）是新加坡消防安全的主管机关。SCDF已发布专门的《储能系统（ESS）技术要求》，构成所有超过规定阈值容量BESS装置的强制审批门槛——无论住宅、商业、工业或公用事业场景均适用。SCDF ESS技术要求涵盖系统级消防安全设计、选址、隔离距离、热失控蔓延缓解、消防抑制、气体探测和通风、紧急停机及向SCDF提交审批文件。这些要求是新加坡专属要求，构成安装和调试前必须通过的独立、不可豁免的项目门槛。SCDF审批与EMA并网审批相互独立——两者均须取得。须聘请在SCDF注册的SCDF认可消防安全检查员和合格人员（QP）进行设计提交和审批。新加坡是领先的城市BESS市场，裕廊岛储能及其他工商业项目已为SCDF合规要求树立了实践先例。
summary.zht: 新加坡民防部隊（SCDF）依據《消防安全法》（第109A章）是新加坡消防安全的主管機關。SCDF已發布專門的《儲能系統（ESS）技術要求》，構成所有超過規定閾值容量BESS裝置的強制審批門檻——無論住宅、商業、工業或公用事業場景均適用。SCDF ESS技術要求涵蓋系統級消防安全設計、選址、隔離距離、熱失控蔓延緩解、消防抑制、氣體探測和通風、緊急停機及向SCDF提交審批文件。這些要求是新加坡專屬要求，構成安裝和調試前必須通過的獨立、不可豁免的項目門檻。SCDF審批與EMA併網審批相互獨立——兩者均須取得。須聘請在SCDF註冊的SCDF認可消防安全檢查員和合格人員（QP）進行設計提交和審批。新加坡是領先的城市BESS市場，裕廊島儲能及其他工商業項目已為SCDF合規要求樹立了實踐先例。

standards_or_laws: Fire Safety Act (Cap. 109A) — Singapore statutory framework for fire safety, SCDF jurisdiction and mandatory approval requirements
SCDF ESS Technical Requirements — Singapore Civil Defence Force technical requirements for energy storage systems (verify current version and capacity thresholds at scdf.gov.sg)
IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (referenced in SCDF ESS requirements and project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected SCDF and project-specification reference)

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements) includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules and is mandatory from August 1, 2025. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures under the Fire Protection Law of the People's Republic of China. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by SCDF as equivalent to Singapore's SCDF ESS Technical Requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with SCDF-compliant design documentation for SCDF approval in Singapore.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求）包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定，自2025年8月1日起强制执行。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由《中华人民共和国消防法》下地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被SCDF认可为等同于新加坡SCDF ESS技术要求。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在新加坡SCDF审批中补充符合SCDF要求的设计文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求）包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定，自2025年8月1日起強制執行。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由《中華人民共和國消防法》下地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被SCDF認可為等同於新加坡SCDF ESS技術要求。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在新加坡SCDF審批中補充符合SCDF要求的設計文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage)

gap.en: Critical gap: SCDF ESS Technical Requirements constitute a mandatory, non-waivable installation gate for all BESS above the prescribed capacity threshold in Singapore. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy SCDF's Singapore-specific ESS requirements. Exporters and project teams must: (a) obtain and review the current SCDF ESS Technical Requirements from scdf.gov.sg before project design — requirements specify cell-level safety evidence (IEC 62619), system-level design obligations (thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection/ventilation, fire suppression, separation distances, emergency shutdown), and documentation for SCDF submission; (b) engage a SCDF-registered qualified person (QP) for fire-safety design submission and SCDF approval before installation; (c) confirm SCDF capacity thresholds that trigger mandatory approval — thresholds may differ by installation type (residential vs. commercial vs. industrial); (d) allow sufficient lead time for SCDF design review and approval before commissioning — SCDF approval is a separate project gate from EMA grid-connection approval, both must be sequenced correctly.
gap.zh: 关键差距：SCDF ESS技术要求对新加坡所有超过规定容量阈值的BESS构成强制、不可豁免的安装门槛。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足SCDF新加坡专属ESS要求。出口商和项目团队须：（a）在项目设计前从scdf.gov.sg获取并审阅最新SCDF ESS技术要求——要求规定电芯级安全证据（IEC 62619）、系统级设计义务（热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测/通风、消防抑制、隔离距离、紧急停机）及向SCDF提交的文件；（b）聘请在SCDF注册的合格人员（QP）进行消防安全设计提交和SCDF审批；（c）确认触发强制审批的SCDF容量阈值——阈值可能因安装类型（住宅、商业、工业）而异；（d）在调试前为SCDF设计审查和审批预留足够的前置时间——SCDF审批是独立于EMA并网审批的项目门槛，两者须正确排序。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：SCDF ESS技術要求對新加坡所有超過規定容量閾值的BESS構成強制、不可豁免的安裝門檻。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足SCDF新加坡專屬ESS要求。出口商和項目團隊須：（a）在項目設計前從scdf.gov.sg獲取並審閱最新SCDF ESS技術要求——要求規定電芯級安全證據（IEC 62619）、系統級設計義務（熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測/通風、消防抑制、隔離距離、緊急停機）及向SCDF提交的文件；（b）聘請在SCDF註冊的合格人員（QP）進行消防安全設計提交和SCDF審批；（c）確認觸發強制審批的SCDF容量閾值——閾值可能因安裝類型（住宅、商業、工業）而異；（d）在調試前為SCDF設計審查和審批預留足夠的前置時間——SCDF審批是獨立於EMA併網審批的項目門檻，兩者須正確排序。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SCDF ESS Technical Requirements approval required for all BESS above the prescribed capacity threshold in Singapore under the Fire Safety Act; SCDF approval is a non-waivable project gate separate from EMA grid-connection approval
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements under the Fire Protection Law of the PRC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SCDF ESS Technical Requirements approval is a mandatory, non-waivable installation gate for BESS in Singapore. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy Singapore's SCDF ESS requirements. Obtain the current SCDF ESS Technical Requirements from scdf.gov.sg and engage a SCDF-registered qualified person (QP) at the earliest project design stage — before system layout, equipment specification, or commissioning planning is finalised. SCDF approval must be sequenced alongside, not after, EMA grid-connection approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SCDF ESS技术要求审批是新加坡BESS的强制、不可豁免安装门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足新加坡SCDF ESS要求。请在最早项目设计阶段从scdf.gov.sg获取最新SCDF ESS技术要求，并聘请SCDF注册合格人员（QP）——须在系统布局、设备规格或调试规划最终确定前完成。SCDF审批须与EMA并网审批同步推进，而非在其之后。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SCDF ESS技術要求審批是新加坡BESS的強制、不可豁免安裝門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足新加坡SCDF ESS要求。請在最早項目設計階段從scdf.gov.sg獲取最新SCDF ESS技術要求，並聘請SCDF註冊合格人員（QP）——須在系統布局、設備規格或調試規劃最終確定前完成。SCDF審批須與EMA併網審批同步推進，而非在其之後。
